Ethereal Bonds Amulet

Once in a while, the amulet's wearer increases their health, spell power, physical and magic armor by 50% for 5 sec.

When a positive effect is cast upon the unit, they restore 30% health to self. The amulet's wearer also casts improved restoration upon 3 random allied units. The targets have 3 random negative effects removed from each of them. The targets restore 40% health, and all their stats are increased by 40% for 4 sec. Stacks up to {?} times. The ability triggers at most once per 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
